title: eustylis geniculata
intro: Eustylis geniculata, also known as the climbing violet or sweet violet, is a flowering plant species native to tropical Africa. Traditionally, Eustylis geniculata is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating skin irritations. Eustylis geniculata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, often in combination with other medicinal plants, to leverage its therapeutic potential.
